calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Mosy Dorooodian, appearing in Propria Persona. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed by the Plaintiff, and no objection by defendant present in court. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-05-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, JPT. Jason Jungreis, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff: Stephen Rose and Defendant: Mosy Doroodian, are present in pro per.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $2,200.00 in favor of the Plaintiff, to be paid within 30 days and with Defendant's acknowlegement of a full satisfaction of judgment in Small Claim case #510873, to be mail to Plaintiff at P.O. Box 2400, Sausalito, CA. 94966.
Parties agreed to terms and deemed settled, and placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Dec. 5, 2006 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212 for Dismissal.
